summary: Iteration 60 - Wealth Command v5.0.0 Complete Feature Testing. All 21 backend tests passed (100%). Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in meeting_workflow.py. Fixed missing CalculatorDisclaimer component in ComplianceDisclaimer.jsx. All v5.0.0 features verified: PWA support, MongoDB persistence, White-label multi-tenancy, Compliance modal 'Don't show again' persistence.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug - used .copy() before insert_one() to prevent _id mutation in response objects
Added missing CalculatorDisclaimer component to ComplianceDisclaimer.jsx
PWA support verified: manifest.json, service-worker.js, offline.html all accessible
MongoDB persistence confirmed for meetings and tasks (storage: 'mongodb' in responses)
Compliance modal 'Don't show again' persists to localStorage correctly
seed_data_creation: Created test meetings and tasks with TEST_ prefix for MongoDB persistence testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 60 completed v5.0.0 feature testing. Key fixes: 1) MongoDB ObjectId serialization in meeting_workflow.py (use .copy() before insert_one), 2) Added CalculatorDisclaimer component. All endpoints working: White-label (/api/tenant/*), Meeting workflow (/api/meeting-automation/*), PWA files (/manifest.json, /service-worker.js, /offline.html). Compliance modal 'Don't show again' uses localStorage key 'wealth_command_compliance_v5'.

mocked_apis.Bank_Feeds: MOCKED - Basiq CDR in demo mode
mocked_apis.Broker_Integrations: MOCKED - All brokers in demo mode

bugs_fixed_this_iteration.bug: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error in meeting_workflow.py
bugs_fixed_this_iteration.root_cause: insert_one() mutates the original dict by adding _id field, which is then returned in response
bugs_fixed_this_iteration.fix: Used .copy() before insert_one() to prevent _id mutation in response objects

bugs_fixed_this_iteration.bug: Missing CalculatorDisclaimer component causing frontend compilation errors
bugs_fixed_this_iteration.root_cause: Component was imported but not exported from ComplianceDisclaimer.jsx

pwa_support.manifest: Valid PWA manifest with 8 icons, 3 shortcuts
pwa_support.service_worker: wealth-command-v5 cache, network-first for API, cache-first for static
pwa_support.offline_page: Styled offline.html with auto-reload on reconnect
